tags.name: Cap La Houssaye
tags.note: Coordinates approximate based on cape position (lat -21, lon 55.2333 per getamap.net); dive depth 4-18m; shore access; all levels including beginners; reefs, small caves, drop-off, seagrass

tags.name: Pain de Sucre
tags.note: Coordinates approximate; site is near Boucan Canot beach, west Reunion; depth 6-20m; fissures, canyons, arches, small caves; named for rock formation on beach

tags.name: Tour de Boucan
tags.note: Coordinates approximate; site is off Boucan Canot beach, Saint-Paul area; depth 6-22m; shore-accessible pinnacle; clownfish, turtles, anemones; isolated rock formation

tags.name: Passe de l'Ermitage
tags.note: GPS from PADI (-21.08526, 55.22158); depth 6-25m; pass/channel through reef crest; turtles, eagle rays, sandy floor, coral plateaus, caves and tunnels

tags.name: Hai Siang
tags.validation_source: dodopalme.com, bleumarineplongee.re, corail-plongee.com, tribloo.com, souslesetoiles974.re, linfo.re
tags.note: Coordinates approximate; 3km offshore from Aigrettes/Cap Homard area near Saint-Gilles; 49m Taiwanese fishing vessel sunk 1980s; sits upright on white sand at 54m; Level 3/Tech certification required; strong currents possible

tags.name: Navarra
tags.note: Coordinates approximate; off Pointe des Aigrettes near Saint-Gilles port; 47m fishing vessel intentionally sunk 1996; broken in two parts by cyclonic swell; depth 40-53m; Level 3 required; one of two deep wrecks near Saint-Gilles alongside Hai Siang

tags.name: Antonio Lorenzo
tags.note: GPS from PADI (-21.14939, 55.26745); 50m Chilean longliner caught illegal fishing near Kerguelen, sunk 1999; rests on port side at ~50m (slipped from original 40m position); near Tombant de la Pointe au Sel

name: Tombant de la Pointe au Sel

tags.name: Tombant de la Pointe au Sel
tags.validation_source: bleumarineplongee.re, tribloo.com, myscubadivinggearguide.com, souslesetoiles974.re, generationvoyage.fr, sea-seek.com
tags.note: Coordinates approximate based on Pointe au Sel cape location (getamap: -21.1833, 55.2833 is the cape tip); drop-off begins at 25-27m and descends to 60-80m; described as Reunion's finest dive by multiple operators; pelagics, hammerhead sharks, whale sharks, manta rays; Level 2+

tags.name: Le Sec Jaune
tags.note: GPS from PADI (-21.20585, 55.27990); coral plateau with drop-off to 20-30m; adjacent to Tombant de la Pointe au Sel; turtles, eagle rays, hard and soft corals; Open Water/CMAS 1 minimum

tags.name: Le Jardin des Kiosques
tags.note: GPS from PADI (-21.18375, 55.28417); depth 3-30m; external slope of coral barrier; crevices, tubes, overhangs; rich marine biodiversity; suitable beginners to advanced; Saint-Leu area

tags.name: Sea Venture
tags.note: Coordinates approximate; in Saint-Paul Bay facing marine cemetery, ~100m from La Barge; 86m Panamanian cargo ship capsized and sunk 16 Nov 1981 while waiting for port entry; upside-down wreck; two large propellers intact; depth 40-49m; Level 2 minimum

tags.name: La Barge de Saint-Paul
tags.note: Coordinates approximate; in Saint-Paul Bay facing marine cemetery, ~100m from Sea Venture; 10m barge lying at 22m on black basaltic sand; large anchor chains; scorpionfish, electric rays, frogfish; popular night dive site; Level 2 minimum

tags.name: La Passe des Trois-Bassins
tags.note: Coordinates approximate; pass through reef crest at Trois-Bassins village between Saint-Gilles and Saint-Leu; depth to 22m; sandy bottom; medium-sized fauna; beginners/Level 1
